tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall address
edit "ICMPTarget"
set subnet 7.0.14.254 255.255.255.255
next
end

config firewall shaper traffic-shaper
edit "ICMP_limit"
set guaranteed-bandwidth 64
set maximum-bandwidth 128
set priority low
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "limit_icmp_out"
set srcintf "Port2"
set dstintf "caldera-br"
set srcaddr "UbuntuHost"
set dstaddr "ICMPTarget"
set action accept
set schedule "always"
set service "ICMP"
set traffic-shaper "ICMP_limit"
set nat enable
next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall service custom
edit "svc-ICMP"
set protocol ICMP
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "limit_icmp_out"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "UbuntuHost"
set dstaddr "ICMPTarget"
set action accept
set schedule "always"
set service "svc-ICMP"
set traffic-shaper "ICMP_limit"
set nat disable
next
end

show firewall policy 0"}
